info.name: Shopify Ajax API
info.description:
The Shopify Ajax API provides lightweight REST endpoints for Shopify theme development. It is an unauthenticated API used to manage the shopping cart, retrieve product data, get product recommendations, and provide predictive search within Shopify-hosted storefronts. All responses return JSON.

Contact Support:
 Name: Shopify
 Email: api@shopify.com

request.description: Retrieves the current cart contents as JSON, including all line items, totals, attributes, notes, and currency information.

item.name: Shopify Add items to the cart

request.description: Adds one or more product variants to the cart. Each item requires a variant ID and quantity. Optional properties and selling plans can be attached to line items.

response.name: The items added to the cart

request.description: Updates cart line item quantities, cart note, cart attributes, or applies a discount code. Quantities can be updated using a map of variant ID to quantity or line number to quantity.

item.name: Shopify Change a cart line item

request.description: Changes the quantity, properties, or selling plan of a single cart line item. Identify the item by line number (1-indexed) or by its key.

item.name: Shopify Clear all items from the cart

request.description: Removes all line items from the cart, returning an empty cart object.
Retrieves estimated shipping rates for the current cart based on the provided shipping address. May be throttled for repeated requests.

item.name: Shopify Retrieve a product by its handle

request.description: Retrieves product information in JSON format using the product handle. Returns product metadata, pricing, variants (up to 250), images, options, and availability. Monetary values reflect the customer presentment currency.

query.description: (Required) The product ID to get recommendations for

request.description: Retrieves product recommendations for a given product. Returns related or complementary products based on purchase history, product descriptions, and related collections.

query.description: (Required) The product ID to get recommendations for
(Required) The product ID to get recommendations for
(Required) The product ID to get recommendations for
Comma-separated resource types to search (product, page, article, collection, query)
Number of results per type (1-10, default 10)
How the limit is distributed: all (shared across types) or each (per type)
Comma-separated fields to search within (title, product_type, vendor, tag, variants.title, variants.sku, body)

request.description: Retrieves predictive search results for a query string. Returns matching products, collections, pages, articles, and query suggestions. Used for search-as-you-type experiences.
